name: continuity
description: Shift-boundary continuity profile: fold docs, task progress, attempts, git status/diff evidence, and artifact refs into .agent.local/continuity checkpoints so a fresh session or another machine can continue real work without reading old chat.
default_done_when: A fresh session can run onduty, read .agent.local/continuity/pickup.md plus the active checkpoint refs, inspect dirty diff evidence, and continue the next bounded slice without old chat context.
legacy_run_log_hint: .ai/plan/handoff.md and .ai/plan/progress/<task-id>.md when --layout legacy-ai-plan is explicitly required
safety_notes: Do not let hooks or side sessions take the repo-level active.json pointer unless they own the mainline.
Use checkpoints/<task-id>/ and sessions/<session-id>.jsonl for plan/review/executor side work.
Use --diff-mode patch only when preserving a dirty patch snapshot is intentional and safe.
Treat active.json and pickup.md as generated views; checkpoints and session JSONL are the source of truth.
Do not publish .agent.local/ to public repositories.
